hero.title: Lithe
hero.subtitle: A modern, lightweight proxy client built with Flutter and the sing-box core.
hero.platforms: Available for Windows, macOS, and Linux
features.title: Features
features.proxy.title: Proxy Management
features.proxy.desc: Switch between Rule, Global, and Direct modes with one click. Test node latency instantly.
features.subs.title: Subscription Management
features.subs.desc: Add subscription URLs, visualize traffic quotas, and track expiration dates at a glance.
features.logs.title: Real-time Logs
features.logs.desc: Stream core logs with level filtering, search, and pause/resume controls.
features.theme.title: Multi-theme
features.theme.desc: Light, Dark, and System themes powered by Material 3 design language.
screenshots.title: Clean & Intuitive Interface
screenshots.desc: Built with Flutter for a native feel across all desktop platforms.
tech.title: Built with Modern Tech
download.title: Download Lithe
download.desc: Free and open source. Get started in seconds.
